chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-982 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For hearing of CMA 3856/24 2.For hearing of main case 04-09-2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioners submits that the grievance of the petitioners has been redressed; therefore, under instructions, he does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
